### kiri contract approval-count

Print the required approver count for the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract approval-count [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--changed-files-from` | Path to newline-delimited file listing changed paths. Typically computed by the workflow via ``git diff --name-only``. | yes |  |  |
| `--restricted-raises-from` | Optional file listing changed paths whose diff introduced ``value: restricted``. | no |  |  |
| `--cross-domain-from` | Optional file listing changed paths that introduce a new cross-domain consumer. | no |  |  |
| `--project` | Project root containing kiri.yml. | no |  |  |

### kiri contract codeowners

Emit a CODEOWNERS file derived from...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract codeowners [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | File to write. Defaults to stdout so CI can pipe into ``.github/CODEOWNERS`` or diff-check. | no |  |  |
| `--check` | Exit 1 when the file at --output diverges from the synthesised body. Use in CI to fence against manual edits that bypass kiri.yml. | no | False |  |

### kiri contract emit

Emit framework artifacts from an ODCS...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract emit [OPTIONS] CONTRACT_PATH
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `CONTRACT_PATH` | Path to an ODCS contract YAML. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--dbt-project` | Root of the target user dbt project. Emits into models/_kiri_generated/. | yes |  |  |
| `--validate`, `--no-validate` | Run semantic validation before emission (default: on). | no | True |  |

### kiri contract export

Export contracts to external formats...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract export [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri contract export semantic-layer`](#kiri-contract-export-semantic-layer) - Export gold contracts as semantic-layer...

#### kiri contract export semantic-layer

Export gold contracts as semantic-layer...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract export semantic-layer [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root (defaults to current directory). | no |  |  |
| `--target` | Semantic-layer target: metricflow \| dbt-semantic \| cube \| databricks-metric-views. Overrides semantic_layer.target in kiri.yml when set. | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Directory to write semantic-layer files to. Overrides semantic_layer.output_path in kiri.yml when set. | no |  |  |
| `--contract` | Export only this contract (by name). | no |  |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri contract export semantic-layer
```

```bash
kiri contract export semantic-layer --contract orders
```

```bash
kiri contract export semantic-layer --target metricflow --output models/semantic/
```

### kiri contract lint

Run governance lint over every contract in...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract lint [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--format` | Output format: text\|pr\|json | no | text |  |
| `--domain` | Restrict findings to one information domain. Cross-contract rules still run against the full project so cross-domain-consumption findings still fire; results are filtered to the scoped domain's files before rendering. | no |  |  |
| `--suggest-zones` | DV-only helper. Walk silver-state DV contracts and suggest a `kiri.medallion.silver_zone` for each one inferred from its parent's zone (sat) or connected hubs (link). Hubs default to raw - no suggestion unless the operator wants to flip them. Bypasses the regular lint rules; emits a YAML-patch guide instead. | no | False |  |

### kiri contract merge-classification

Stamp ``kiri.classification`` onto every...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract merge-classification [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--contracts` | Directory containing ODCS contract YAML files (recursed). | yes |  |  |
| `--proposals` | Directory of per-contract proposal JSON files from `kiri inventory pre-classify`. | yes |  |  |
| `--ai-results` | Optional AI-batch results JSONL to merge on top of heuristic proposals. | no |  |  |
| `--operator-overrides` | Optional operator-overrides JSON file; entries win every precedence contest. | no |  |  |
| `--precedence` | Highest source allowed through (operator \| ai_gateway \| heuristic_high \| heuristic_default). | no | operator |  |
| `--dry-run` | Report what would change without writing any contract YAML. | no | False |  |

### kiri contract new

Scaffold a new contract in MVP form: AI...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract new [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Source name (from sources/*.yml); prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--table` | Table name within the source; prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--name` | Contract name (snake_case); prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--description` | What this dataset is for; prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--owner` | Contract owner email; prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--classification` | public\|internal\|confidential\|restricted; prompted if omitted | no |  |  |
| `--domain` | Business domain; defaults to the source's domain | no |  |  |
| `--overwrite`, `--no-overwrite` | Allow overwriting an existing contract file | no | False |  |
| `--yes`, `-y` | Skip the save-confirmation prompt (use for CI/tests) | no | False |  |
| `--legacy-contracts` | Allow writing under `contracts/` even when the project uses the layer-contract layout. Escape hatch for mixed-mode operators; default is to refuse with a closed-menu hint. | no | False |  |

### kiri contract promote

Promote a contract along the medallion...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract promote [OPTIONS] NAME
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `NAME` | Contract name (from the contract's `name` field). | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--to` | Target medallion state: draft\|bronze\|silver\|gold\|deprecated. | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--active`, `--inactive` | Also flip kiri.medallion.active. Omit to leave unchanged. `--inactive` pauses runtime execution without demoting the state; `--active` resumes it. | no |  |  |

### kiri contract scaffold

Render ``contracts/<name>.yml`` from a...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract scaffold [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--name` | Contract name (snake_case). Defaults to <source>_<table>. | no |  |  |
| `--source-urn` | Full source URN, e.g. urn:kirimana:source:crm:customers. Mutually exclusive with --source/--table. | no |  |  |
| `--source` | Source name (use with --table) | no |  |  |
| `--table` | Source-table physical name (use with --source) | no |  |  |
| `--owner` | Contract owner email or group | no |  |  |
| `--domain` | Business domain (snake_case) | no |  |  |
| `--classification` | public \| internal \| confidential \| restricted | no | internal |  |
| `--description` | One-line purpose of the contract | no |  |  |
| `--semantic-entity` | Business entity for kiri.semantic.entity. Defaults to the source table/entity; explicit value wins. | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--overwrite` | Replace an existing contracts/<name>.yml | no | False |  |

### kiri contract schema-export

Emit a JSON Schema document for ODCS v3 +...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract schema-export [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--output`, `-o` | Output path for the JSON Schema file. | no | contracts.schema.json |  |
| `--standard` | Closed menu: odcs, odcs+kiri, kiri-only. 'odcs' = strip kiri.* extensions; 'kiri-only' = only kiri.* keys; 'odcs+kiri' = full Kirimana surface (default). | no | odcs+kiri |  |
| `--draft` | Closed menu: 2020-12, 07. JSON Schema dialect. | no | 2020-12 |  |

### kiri contract show

Print a canonical-model view of the contract.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract show [OPTIONS] PATH
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PATH` | Path to an ODCS contract YAML. | yes |  |  |

### Options

None.

### kiri contract sync-from-live

Propose contract patches that would bring...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract sync-from-live [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--contract` | Path to the ODCS contract YAML to sync. | yes |  |  |
| `--catalog` | Live catalog the table sits in (Unity Catalog name, etc.). | yes |  |  |
| `--schema` | Live schema/database name. | yes |  |  |
| `--target` | Named profile from kiri.yml; defaults to default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults to the contract's nearest project root. | no |  |  |
| `--propose` | Emit a YAML proposal for review. Mutually exclusive with --apply. | no | False |  |
| `--apply` | Write the patched contract YAML back to disk (or to --output if set). Mutually exclusive with --propose; refused when policy is fail_closed. | no | False |  |
| `--output` | Where to write the result. For --propose: defaults to ./sync-proposal.yml. For --apply: defaults to the contract path (in-place patch). | no |  |  |

### kiri contract validate

Structural + semantic validation of an...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract validate [OPTIONS] PATH
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `PATH` | Path to an ODCS contract YAML. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--strict`, `--no-strict` | Exit non-zero on semantic warnings (errors always fail). | no | False |  |

### kiri contract verify-live

Diff the live table's schema against the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri contract verify-live [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--contract` | Path to the ODCS contract YAML to verify. | yes |  |  |
| `--catalog` | Live catalog the table sits in (Unity Catalog name, etc.). | yes |  |  |
| `--schema` | Live schema/database name. | yes |  |  |
| `--target` | Named profile from kiri.yml; defaults to default_target. | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults to the contract's nearest project root. | no |  |  |
| `--fail-on` | Closed menu: one of 'add', 'drop', 'type-mismatch', 'meta-mismatch', 'all'. Findings of this kind cause exit code 1. | no | type-mismatch |  |
| `--output` | Where to write the JSON report. | no | verify-live.json |  |

Semantic-aware diff of two ODCS contracts.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri diff [OPTIONS] A B
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `A` |  | yes |  |  |
| `B` |  | yes |  |  |

### Options

None.

### kiri intent propose

Propose a technique-neutral Semantic...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri intent propose [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root (defaults to CWD). | no | . |  |
| `--source-shape` | Existing RDW shape so Kiri calibrates confidence honestly: flat \| kimball \| data_vault \| mixed \| unknown \| greenfield. | no | unknown |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Where to write the proposed SIM JSON (default: <project>/.kirimana/proposed-intent.json). | no |  |  |

### kiri layer diff

Show per-(domain, layer) deltas between...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri layer diff [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults (in order) to KIRIMANA_PROJECT, the nearest kiri.yml above the cwd, then the `kiri use` active project. | no |  |  |
| `--target` | First target to compare. | yes |  |  |
| `--vs` | Second target to compare. | yes |  |  |

### kiri layer migrate-from-contracts

Atomically collapse...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri layer migrate-from-contracts [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults (in order) to KIRIMANA_PROJECT, the nearest kiri.yml above the cwd, then the `kiri use` active project. | no |  |  |
| `--contracts` | Per-table contracts directory to migrate. | yes |  |  |
| `--out` | Output directory (default: <project>/01-config). The verb always writes under <out>/<domain>/<layer>.yml. | no |  |  |
| `--dry-run` | Preview the plan without writing. | no | False |  |
| `--keep-archive` | Archive the source dir to <contracts-dir>.archived/ instead of deleting it. | no | False |  |

### kiri layer show

Render the resolved view of one ``(domain,...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri layer show [OPTIONS] DOMAIN LAYER
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `DOMAIN` | Domain name (directory under 01-config/). | yes |  |  |
| `LAYER` | Layer name (bronze\|silver\|gold\|pit). | yes |  |  |

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory. Defaults (in order) to KIRIMANA_PROJECT, the nearest kiri.yml above the cwd, then the `kiri use` active project. | no |  |  |
| `--target` | Target binding to display (default: first). | no |  |  |
| `--format` | Output format: text\|json. | no | text |  |

Schema-registry push/pull.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri schema [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri schema push`](#kiri-schema-push) - Push Avro-rendered contract schemas to the...

### kiri schema push

Push Avro-rendered contract schemas to the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri schema push [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--backend` | Registry backend: confluent \| glue. | yes |  |  |
| `--project` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--contract` | Limit push to one contract by name. Default: push every contract in the project. | no |  |  |
| `--url` | Confluent registry base URL (required for confluent). | no |  |  |
| `--registry-name` | Glue registry name (required for glue). | no |  |  |
| `--region` | AWS region for Glue. Optional. | no |  |  |
| `--dry-run` | Print the Avro JSON that WOULD be pushed, without contacting the registry. Safe for CI previews. | no | False |  |
